metadata.description: Code-X: a structured AI development methodology for non-coders (plan, build, fix, with the cx checker and cross-family review gates).

plugins.name: code-x
plugins.description: Code-X: a structured AI development methodology for non-coders. Three-stage enforced workflow (plan, build, fix), built-in cx checker, cross-family review gates, and session continuity — so AI agents plan before they build and catch the corners they quietly cut.
